tips_en: Start with Code2LoRA (Paper 2)—it tackles a timely and practical problem with a novel hypernetwork formulation, achieves impressive results (matching per-repo LoRA without costly training), and contributes a new benchmark (RepoPeftBench). EmbedFilter (Paper 1) is a strong follow-up: its training-free embedding improvement is elegant and broadly useful. A notable thread across all three papers is their reliance on Qwen-family models (Qwen/Llama/Mistral in Paper 1, Qwen3-Embedding in Paper 2, Qwen3-Omni in Paper 3), making them a coherent set for exploring how modern LLMs can be repurposed across embedding, adaptation, and multimodal evaluation tasks.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读 Code2LoRA（论文2）——它针对一个前沿且实用的问题提出了新颖的超网络方案，效果显著（无需昂贵的逐仓库训练即可匹配逐仓库 LoRA 的性能），并贡献了新基准 RepoPeftBench。 接着推荐 EmbedFilter（论文1），其免训练的嵌入改进方法既优雅又用途广泛。 三篇论文都围绕 Qwen 系列模型展开（论文1中的 Qwen/Llama/Mistral，论文2中的 Qwen3-Embedding，论文3中的 Qwen3-Omni），构成了一组连贯探索现代 LLM 在嵌入、适配与多模态评估任务中能力的研究。
